What's going on everyone? Welcome to Make Your Own Ads. Okay, so there's three reasons that we tell everyone to make their own ads and and this is really a skill that you need to have. So first thing is why is this a skill that you need to have? If the premise of Gym Launch and the skill that you that we are trying to impart upon you is to make it rain for yourself or to fish for yourself then you can't be dependent on anyone including us and that would be contrary to our mission is if you became dependent on us. We will always try to make things faster or easier for everyone which is why we provide the videos that we do and we will continue to test and do things because some of our clients will still be lazy and not listen to this video. That being said, you should listen to this video and make more money and have the skill set as a result. So you need to be able to make your own ads because when you want to refresh a campaign or you want to run a tweak on your campaign or you want to run a totally different campaign if you want to whatever. Any of those things would require you to make your own ad and not be reliant on us or someone else to make the creative for you. Okay so if you want to be in control of your business you need to know how to make a rain for yourself and a part of that is making your own ads. So that's number one. Number two, why then why are these ads that we ask you to make not cool? So I will be the first to tell you so like you guys at this point hopefully you consume a decent amount of my content, you see my videos, you get that like I'm not the guy who's shaking his ass on the camera. I will do whatever it takes to reach the customer that I'm trying to reach and you're also trying to reach them where they are at. Okay so like the first thing is a funny story. I was back in the day I started marketing for dentists. I know. And I sent the page over to the dentist and I was like hey check out this awesome page it's converting really really well. He calls me back in a furious light storm of like that's nothing like it looks like a high schooler made this blah blah blah blah blah blah. He's like I would never opt into this page and I was like good thing you don't need dental work because you are not your customer. Okay so you are not Cindy who's 38 years old has two kids and is overweight. Maybe you are but like it's not likely that you are Cindy. Alright so you shouldn't try and think like what I opt in this page it's not really about you it's just about the numbers. Does the page convert? Does this ad convert? Which is why having a variety of things in your ad in terms of look and feel is so important and we're gonna cover that in this next video of like the real details of like all the different ways you can make variations in the ads but I just want to cover the why on this one. So the first thing that you're trying to hit here is a pattern interrupt which for the most part looks retarded. So if you're like hey how's it going? Like you have to realize that in that split second you have to grab attention before you can actually deliver a message. Okay I can't tell you many times people are like man I can't get my ads to convert and it's like how's it going? We're looking for 40 local residents who are trying to transform in six weeks for our six week challenge which is free. You'll get a meal plan and grocery list with preparation instructions eating Al-Qaeda. You'll be able to work out at our facility three times with the trainer. We're a state-of-the-art facility here we take our training. Like you get my point here like the vibe sucks and on camera you have to be like ten times bigger because you're ten times smaller right and so like if I go super nuts it actually doesn't look that crazy on camera right. So you have to have pattern interrupts and sometimes pattern interrupts aren't cool. Most of the time actually they're not cool. Me shaking my ass doesn't make me look good right but I don't care right and you should not care either because what you should care about is what works okay. So you are not your customer do what works pattern interrupts okay so hopefully I covered all that stuff because at the end of the day it's about ROI like that's all that it is and one more thing on this because I should have added this was how does this relate to branding okay because I get this question a lot they're like I'll have a gym owner who says like this isn't aligned with my brand no one knows you exist no we are very big as a company compared to a gym in general and we are very niche and still nine times out of ten people have never heard of us okay here's a good example to drive this home. A friend of mine is named Chris would launch Orange Theories so most of you guys are probably hearing about Orange Theories right and so he was telling me that they do a three-month campaign where they do they give two weeks free in the beginning and that's the only time they do two free weeks and he said that we had a thousand leads and we closed 500 over the phone for the two free weeks we start with 500 members on EFT and I was like oh that's awesome man I was like you know what I was like dude that's so easy for you I was like you probably pick up the phone and everyone's like oh Orange Theory awesome here's my credit card and he was like actually that's not true I was like what do you mean it's not true he's like well nine out of ten people who respond to those ads have never heard of Orange Theory. Orange Theory okay and so for the people who are worried about your brand in your marketplace no one knows you exist and the best way to actually spread your brand is have a highly profitable highly converting advertising campaign because otherwise no one will even know you exist right because the really branded really professional looking stuff doesn't work right if it did that's what we'd be giving you right so like whatever works is what matters so at the end of the day don't spend five five more grand on your lobby spin on ads that work okay that's my final point there so females work the best second thing is if you can get like tank top show a little bit of skin not sexual that's not my point but show that they're in shape show some shoulders show some upper neck peck like back you want to be able to see that like like especially if they can approach the camera like they're running from afar and then they appear up in the camera very quickly that means you get a full scope of the person why is this important probably because you got to look like you're in shape right and so that's kind of the next point is like fit if you have someone on your staff who's making these videos I'm sure they're really great but if they're not in shape we're selling fitness we're selling weight loss you can't have something like I know maybe this person might have lost 80 pounds and now they're only 50 pounds overweight that's amazing and that's an awesome story for them but we need to do stuff that converts okay so you have to use discernment we have to be wise about this and the end user you have 20 seconds they're not going to hear her life story in that time period right so you have to do stuff that feeds into preconceived notions we're not going to break their beliefs in 20 seconds we have to go align with their beliefs we have to give them the ham so that they'll eat the garlic and I'm gonna wrap up with that in one second because it's a really important story so you want to have a girl young and then people sometimes like Blonde or Burnett doesn't matter in some of the bigger tests we've got actually burnets do better I'm not sure I'd be like I'm just I'm just I'm just giving you data all right but if you have if you hit those things and you have big smiles right but that is it big smiles right big smiles huge energy on camera these are the things and you have to be insane think like like Red Bull times five right like huge huge amounts of energy like people should if people are watching you record these videos they should be like oh they're insane but that's a crazy person like that's how it should be like because otherwise it's not gonna work okay so let me wrap up this final little this whole concept with one story so one of my favorite stories is a story of the ham and the garlic okay works like this little boy talking to his grandmother okay and the dog gets ticks can't get the ticks off the dog and the grandmother says give the dog some garlic and the the dog will sweat out garlic and then the ticks will disappear kid goes to over the dog tries to give him garlic dog like turns away I don't want that right obviously it's gone grandma's he goes like hey grandma it's not working she says wrap it up with some ham and then give it to him kid goes back wraps up the ham gives it to a dog eats it few hours later he sees the ticks crawling up the wall now why is that significant because the people that are receiving these ads are not aware enough yet we want them to learn how to do resistance training be motivated prioritize their fitness like learn to count their macros there's all these things that we want them to be able to do but we cannot say that because that's giving them garlic that's not where they're at at this point okay so you have to meet someone where they're at you have to give them what they want so you can give them what they need later okay so you have to give them get their attention get them to click get them to opt in give them the promotion that they believe they need but then when they come in you will explain to them you don't really need something that's free because everything you've done in your life has been free right so what you need is you need to have something that motivates you and for right now money is going to be that thing in time that internal versus external motives of control is going to flip you're no longer going to need the money and you're going to be internally motivated because the changes in how you feel but you're not gonna say that on an act because that's not where they're at but you need the ad to give you the opportunity to be able to change that person's life I hope this makes sense so to recap you need to learn the skill ads are not gonna be sexy you're not gonna feel cool doing it at all but you need to do it and you need to get good at it and how do you get good at things you practice you do a lot of them like put it four hours in to get two or three amazing videos okay and the other thing is you're gonna test them you don't know which one's gonna work neither do I that's all the test lots of ads no one knows okay and last one the person the video matters they have to smile that have tons of energy and then typically young females and tank tops that are fit tend to convert okay otherwise hope that makes sense we'll give you some video on how to make like some more tactical variations for you all right
